action_requested: Review legal/KYC/tax/payment/payout/account-contract gates before any marketplace listing, seller signup, payment setup, or public sales claim for the Agent Skill Starter Kit.
deadline: No external deadline; review before any marketplace or seller-account action.
funds_or_payout_involved: Potential digital product revenue; no funds received and no payout setup approved.
jurisdiction_if_relevant: User location presumed United States unless user specifies otherwise; payment/tax review must ask the user before any commitment.
venue_url: Gumroad, Lemon Squeezy, PromptBase, and any direct-download route identified by the local Agent Skill Starter Kit bundle.
